hooks.template: Here's exactly how much (insert action/item) you need to (insert result)
hooks.text: Here's exactly how much a 20K PayPal supplier payment really costs a business owner.

hooks.template: They said, "(insert famous cliché or quote)" — that's a lie.
hooks.text: The receipt says 20K. The real cost says something else entirely.

hooks.template: Yesterday I was at (insert location) when I noticed something (insert adjective).
hooks.text: A business owner checked one PayPal receipt and noticed something off.

hooks.template: (insert big result) from (insert item/thing). Here's how you can do it in X steps.
hooks.text: 2,000 dollars saved on one 20K supplier payment. Here's the math.

hooks.template: (insert big brand) didn't want to sponsor this video, let me show you what they're missing out on.
hooks.text: PayPal won't show a business owner this math on a 20K supplier payment.
